presets.label: Minimal footprint
presets.description: No opinionated database views; use your own tables. Safe default when you only need AO routing.

presets.label: Core + ops views
presets.description: Operational views for catalog, crypto wrappers, replication lag, SLOs, coupons, and sync error triage.

presets.label: Auth RBAC views
presets.description: RBAC coverage and sync health views to audit role assignments and expirations.

presets.label: Commerce sample
presets.description: Minimal commerce sample view for payment status rollup.

presets.label: Outbox metrics sample
presets.description: Sample event outbox metrics to validate pipelines and alerting.
